        prefix_xor[i] = prefix_xor[i-1] ^ nums[i-1]
    dp = [[float('inf')] * (k + 1) for _ in range(n + 1)]
    for i in range(1, n + 1):
        dp[i][1] = prefix_xor[i]
    for j in range(2, k + 1):
        for i in range(j, n + 1):
            min_val = float('inf')
            for m in range(j-1, i):

                if current_max < min_val:
                    min_val = current_max
            dp[i][j] = min_val
    return dp[n][k]
